home.title: Fody Labs — Software Engineering
home.heroDesc: Desktop, web, mobile — we’ve mastered them all. Now AI-powered. We build lightweight, resilient mobile apps with .NET MAUI.
home.expertiseDesc: One team covering every platform. Native feel, shared knowledge.
home.mobileDesc: Cross-platform mobile apps with .NET MAUI — native performance on Android and iOS from a single codebase.
home.desktopDesc: Windows and macOS desktop applications built with WPF, WinUI, and Mac Catalyst for professional workflows.
home.webDesc: Modern web solutions — from static sites and SPAs to full-stack platforms with ASP.NET and cloud backends.
home.techDesc: We use battle-tested technologies to deliver reliable, maintainable software.
home.ctaDesc: Let’s discuss your project. We’ll help you choose the right platform and technology stack.

about.title: About — Fody Labs
about.description: Learn about Fody Labs — 25+ years building desktop, web, and mobile software.
about.label: About Us
about.intro: Since the late 1990s we’ve been shipping production software — from COM/ActiveX components to modern cross-platform mobile apps.
about.storyP1: Fody Labs started as a one-person consultancy and grew into a focused engineering studio. Over 25+ years we’ve worked with startups, enterprises, and everything in between — always hands-on, always code-first.
about.storyP2: Today we specialize in .NET MAUI mobile development, building apps that feel native on every platform while sharing a single codebase. We combine deep platform knowledge with modern AI tooling to ship faster without cutting corners.
about.value1Desc: We write code, review code, and ship code. No committees, no slide decks.
about.value2Desc: Small team, fast decisions. You talk directly to the engineer building your product.
about.value3Desc: Working software over documentation. We iterate in short cycles with real builds.
about.value4Desc: We use AI tools daily to accelerate development — not replace engineering judgment.
about.timeline1999: Started building desktop applications with Delphi and C++
about.timeline2005: Transitioned to .NET ecosystem — WinForms, WPF, ASP.NET
about.timeline2022: Adopted .NET MAUI for cross-platform mobile development
about.timeline2024: Integrated AI tooling into daily engineering workflow
about.fodyText: The fody is a small, vibrant bird native to the islands of the Indian Ocean. We see them every day here in the Seychelles, where we live and work. Bright, resourceful, and perfectly adapted to island life — the fody felt like a natural fit for a studio that builds smart, lightweight software from a tropical base, serving clients around the world.

contact.title: Contact — Fody Labs
contact.description: Get in touch with Fody Labs for your software engineering needs.
contact.label: Contact
contact.intro: Have a project in mind? Drop us a line and we’ll get back to you.
contact.locationText: Working globally, based in the Seychelles
